backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Curation, Swarm, Location, LawToken, InterpretationToken, collectibles, voting, etc.) and persistent state maps for the application backend on the Internet Computer.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four UI change requirements (rename 'Profile Settings' to 'Settings', add 'Collectibles' tab, remove NFTGallery from settings modal, rename 'BUZZ' to 'Leaderboard') to their affected files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles and notable recent changes across the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing authentication state, view routing (graph, tree, terminal, swarms, buzz, collectibles), profile setup modal, and theme provider.
frontend/src/components/CreateNodeDialog: Dialog component for creating all node types (Curation, Swarm, Location, InterpretationToken) with parent selection dropdowns, ISO country code support, and custom attribute management.
Admin alert dialog that requires typing 'RESET' to confirm permanent deletion of all application data, then reloads the page on success.
A modal dialog that displays a filterable and sortable flat list of graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) with badges showing node type, jurisdiction, shared law token status, and linked location counts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a heart icon and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The app header with logo, theme toggle, navigation tabs (Graph, List, Terminal, Swarms, Buzz, Collectibles), login/logout via Internet Identity, and a create-node dialog trigger.
frontend/src/components/LandingGraphDiag: An animated canvas-based force-directed graph diagram for the landing page that fetches graph data with a 24-hour localStorage cache and renders nodes with hover tooltips using a grey/gold color scheme.
frontend/src/components/MermaidDiagram.t: A component that dynamically loads Mermaid.js from CDN and renders a Mermaid diagram from a provided text string, handling loading, error, and stale-render states.
frontend/src/components/NFTDetailModal.t: A modal for viewing and minting collectible editions of law or interpretation tokens, showing edition ownership status, BUZZ balance, mint settings, and handling the mint transaction flow.
frontend/src/components/NFTGallery.tsx: Displays a grid of Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles owned by the current user, with a green checkmark badge if the user has minted a copy, and opens a detail modal on click.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSettingsM: A modal dialog for editing the user's profile name, social URL, and NFT mint settings (number of copies), while also displaying their current BUZZ token balance.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A one-time setup modal that prompts new users to enter a username to create their profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/SchemaBuilderFil: A filter/sort modal for browsing InterpretationTokens, supporting filtering by tags, from/to nodes, and sorting by name, creation date, or context length.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipA: Displays pending and approved swarm membership requests for a given swarm, allowing the owner to approve contributors.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipB: Renders a context-aware button or badge for swarm membership: shows 'Creator' for the swarm owner, 'Member' if already joined, or a 'Join' button to send a membership request.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipM: Displays a card listing all swarms the current user created or joined, with an accordion for each swarm that renders a SwarmMembershipApproval component for managing contributors.
frontend/src/components/TerminalDisambig: Renders a keyboard-navigable list of disambiguated node candidates when multiple matches are found, supporting arrow key selection, Enter to confirm, and Escape to cancel.
frontend/src/components/TerminalOntology: Displays ontology output in both Turtle (TTL) and Mermaid diagram formats with copy-to-clipboard buttons and error handling for diagram rendering failures.
frontend/src/components/VoronoiDiagram.t: Renders an interactive canvas-based Voronoi diagram of graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, tokens) with a 24-hour localStorage cache, hover tooltips, and a pixel-sampling algorithm for cell boundary computation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, graph data (with localStorage caching), swarm management, BUZZ balances, memberships, law/interpretation tokens, and collectible minting.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and includes custom scrollbar and Voronoi diagram styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/BuzzLeaderboard.tsx: Page component that fetches and displays a ranked leaderboard of BUZZ scores, scaling stored integer values by 10^7 and showing rank icons for the top three entries.
frontend/src/pages/CollectiblesView.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the NFTGallery component for browsing and minting Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles.
frontend/src/pages/DebugPanel.tsx: Admin debug page that displays graph data (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) in tabbed tables and exposes a data reset dialog for admin users.
frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx: Interactive canvas-based graph visualization page that renders nodes and edges with zoom/pan, spatial indexing for viewport culling, persistent layout caching, and node-type filters.
frontend/src/pages/OntologiesView.tsx: Page that displays the core Hyvmind OWL/Turtle ontology and dynamically generated per-swarm ontologies from graph data, with collapsible sections and download support.
frontend/src/pages/TerminalPage.tsx: Main terminal page component that renders a command-line interface for creating and querying graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, interpretation tokens). Handles command parsing, disambiguation, session persistence, ontology generation, and auto-scrolling message display.
frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx: Tree view page that renders the graph data as a collapsible hierarchical tree, displaying nodes (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) with badges, create buttons, and swarm membership controls.
frontend/src/utils/coreOntology.ts: Defines shared Turtle/OWL ontology string constants for the hyvmind domain, including prefix declarations, class definitions (Node, Curation, Swarm, Location, LawToken, InterpretationToken), and object/data property definitions.
frontend/src/utils/ontologySanitize.ts: Provides utility functions to sanitize strings into valid Turtle local names and Mermaid node IDs, and to truncate labels for compact diagram display.
frontend/src/utils/terminalCommands.ts: Implements terminal command execution logic for creating curations, swarms, locations, and interpretation tokens, including field validation, jurisdiction code checking, tag type parsing, and formatted error/success messages.
frontend/src/utils/terminalMessages.ts: Exports pure functions that return formatted string messages for terminal output, including help text, error messages, find results, filter results, and missing-argument errors.
frontend/src/utils/terminalNameResolutio: Resolves node name references (by name or ID) for terminal commands, returning resolved, ambiguous, not-found, or graph-not-loaded statuses. Determines valid node types per command/field and searches curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, and interpretation tokens case-insensitively.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyMerma: Generates a compact Mermaid flowchart diagram showing a node's ontology context, including parent/child (hasChild) and interpretation (FromRelation/ToRelation) relationships. Limits children to 2 and outgoing interpretations to 1 for compactness.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyTurtl: Generates RDF Turtle serialization for a given graph node, organized into Properties, Classes, and Relations sections with standard ontology prefixes. Supports all node types (Curation, Swarm, Location, LawToken, InterpretationToken) and handles typed tag annotations.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOutputFormatt: Parses terminal message text into structured line tokens with type metadata (heading, command, description, example, list, result) and indentation levels. Also provides a helper to get emoji markers for success/error message types.
frontend/src/utils/terminalParser.ts: Parses terminal command strings (slash-prefixed) into structured objects with command name and key=value fields, supporting quoted values, repeated keys, and special brace-delimited tokens syntax. Returns success/error status with parsed fields or an error message.
frontend/src/utils/terminalSession.ts: Persists and restores terminal message history to/from localStorage with versioned session storage. Automatically invalidates and clears sessions when the version number changes.
frontend/src/utils/ttlToMermaid.ts: Parses TTL (Turtle RDF) text to extract node labels and relationships, then generates a Mermaid flowchart diagram string. Also exports a wrapper function for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/voronoiPalette.ts: Defines a fixed color palette (fill, stroke, seed) for the five Hyvmind node types and exports a lookup function to retrieve styles by node type.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion keyframes, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including architecture notes, known issues, completed features, and pending feature requests for a decentralized graph app on the Internet Computer.
